nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: Usually, I'm collaborating. I'll start by providing the context of the app and what I already did, then I'll explain what I need to do

nodes.label: AI for repetitive simple tasks
nodes.label_negative: AI for simple tasks it often misses
nodes.grounding_span: I prefer to hand over to the AI everything that it can do, and I prefer to be more focused on the harder parts or on the simple tasks that the AI often misses

nodes.label: AI as debugging assistant
nodes.grounding_span: I get frustrated when I ask the AI for debugging and it provides solutions that are not working for me

nodes.label: AI integration into existing software
nodes.label_negative: AI lack of full context causing mismatches
nodes.grounding_span: the AI lacks the full context of your entire codebase, so it makes assumptions about imports, function names

nodes.label: AI as productivity enhancer
nodes.grounding_span: As the AI evolves, I'm going to use it more to improve my productivity

nodes.label: AI as tool for career advancement
nodes.grounding_span: I'm improving my skills on the AI side, how the AI works, how can I use it and so on

nodes.label: Professional competence and future-proofing
nodes.grounding_span: if the AI is going to do my actual tasks I'm going to learn how to use the AI in ways that few people know

nodes.label: Problem-solving and debugging success
nodes.grounding_span: I was looking for a bug and I didn't know how to fix it

nodes.label: Satisfaction with collaborative workflow
nodes.grounding_span: Usually, I'm collaborating. I'll start by providing the context of the app and what I already did

nodes.label: Frustration with debugging loops
nodes.grounding_span: I get frustrated when I ask the AI for debugging and it provides solutions that are not working for me

nodes.label: Optimism about AI as future tool
nodes.grounding_span: As the AI evolves, I'm going to use it more to improve my productivity

nodes.label: Proactive embrace of AI as strategic tool
nodes.grounding_span: I'm improving my skills on the AI side, how the AI works, how can I use it and so on

nodes.label: Iterative collaborative problem-solving
